title: 低买高卖，是最长的谎言
content:
一九九八，九龙，旧唐楼 那年我刚开始做投资。没有手机，没有电脑，只有一份报纸，一支笔，和一本翻烂了的格雷厄姆。书上说，低买高卖。四个字，像一道咒语。我信了。

我在一间没有窗的房间里，对着密密麻麻的数字画线。我找了所有看起来便宜的东西，像在旧货市场挑二手家具。我以为便宜就是好…

title: 光模块龙头港股路演纪要0722
content: Infocus International held a Hong Kong IPO roadshow at Morgan Stanley, projecting strong AI optical interconnect demand through 2027-2028 with supply chain constraints remaining the primary bottleneck. The company expects continued quarterly growth of 20-30%. Pluggable modules will dominate for 2-3 years, while NPO and CPO technologies serve scale-up networks. The firm plans 2.4T coherent product mass production next year in a potential $10B+ market. This year it expects to deliver ~40M optical modules, over 70% silicon photonics-based with nearly 100% self-designed chips. Gross margin has reached ~45%, supported by premium product mix and vertical integration in PIC, EIC, and custom designs.

title: 警方通报 16 岁内蒙高中生被刺身亡案，称案发地不属涉黄场所，哪些信息值得关注？
content: Inner Mongolian police clarified a fatal stabbing case involving a 16-year-old high school student killed on May 24, 2026. The 36-year-old suspect was arrested and is facing prosecution. Police debunked online rumors: the crime scene was a vacant residential property, not an illegal venue; the suspect was unemployed, not security personnel. The victim and nine companions had gone to the area seeking prostitution services, provoking a conflict with the suspect. Authorities urged against spreading unverified information to protect the minor victim's family.

title: Overload and insight look identical from the outside
content: From an external perspective, overload and insight appear indistinguishable. Both may involve intense focus, similar behavioral patterns, or comparable visible outputs. An observer cannot reliably tell whether someone is experiencing cognitive overwhelm or genuine understanding based solely on outward signs. The distinction between mental strain and actual comprehension requires internal awareness rather than external observation.

Chinese public funds have heavily concentrated in technology stocks by Q2 2024, displacing traditional holdings like Kweichow Moutai. The author draws parallels to 2021's consumer/healthcare bubble and 2022's new energy collapse, warning this pattern will repeat. Two star managers, Liu Yanchun and Zhang Kun, were reportedly forced by their fund companies to switch from consumer to tech stocks at inopportune times, resulting in significant losses versus staying put. The author argues this forced "style drift" signals remaining institutional tech buying capacity is exhausted, with multiple seller types already exiting—suggesting retail investors cannot absorbcoming selling pressure.

title: Claude重磅上新：录屏+语音，一键蒸馏Skill替自己干活
content: Anthropic added a "Record a Skill" feature to Claude's desktop Cowork app on July 21, allowing Pro, Max, and Team users to create reusable AI skills by recording their screen while narrating workflows. The tool automatically converts demonstrations into deployable skills accessible via slash commands, eliminating the need to write markdown documentation. This lowers the barrier for capturing implicit expertise and judgment logic that is difficult to document. The development reflects a broader shift where work's competitive advantage moves from simply knowing how to do tasks to performing uniquely valuable activities that others cannot replicate.

title: 我在WAIC 2026看见的十大趋势
content: WAIC 2026, China's premier AI conference, drew 400,000 attendees despite extreme weather, reflecting intense public enthusiasm. Ten key trends emerged: the event became China's "AI World Cup" for product launches; interactive hardware-software integration replaced passive demos; AI agents capable of task completion superseded chatbots; base model makers diverged strategically; world models became the contested next frontier for physical AI; embodied AI shifted to supply chains and practical industrial deployment; productivity-focused robots favored wheeled over humanoid forms; domestic computing infrastructure evolved beyond single chips to supernodes and networks; embodied infrastructure suppliers gained prominence; and China's AI user ecosystem demonstrated unique global scale.

title: AI PC过时了，AC一夜爆发，Agent真的需要专属电脑？
content: AMD proposes "Agent Computer" (AC), a dedicated device for AI agents to run continuously, independently of user PCs. Unlike AI PCs aimed at human users, ACs operate headless via remote commands, handling long-running tasks like coding and data processing. Lenovo, SynSense, and others showcased compact, high-memory AC devices at WAIC 2025. AMD argues separating agents from personal computers improves security, resource allocation, and uptime, though critics note current PCs suffice for most users. ACs may complement rather than replace PCs for developers and power users.

title: Vibe Coding 时代，大家的 SSH 密钥凭证还躺在磁盘上吗？
content: The article discusses securing credentials in the AI coding era amid rising supply-chain attacks. The author recommends using 1Password to store SSH keys and AWS credentials rather than leaving them on disk. Setup requires 1Password 8, its CLI tool, and enabling developer options. SSH keys are configured via ~/.ssh/config with specific IdentityFile and IdentityAgent settings; agent forwarding enables remote server authentication through local 1Password. AWS credentials are retrieved via `op read` commands with biometric approval. The author notes trade-offs between security and convenience, and advises against enabling Git commit signing due to excessive authorization prompts.

title: 王祖贤，把脸卖给了AI
content: Chinese actress Joey Wang, who retired 22 years ago, has authorized NetEase to use her AI-recreated youthful likeness for the 18th anniversary of its game "Tianxia." The AI short film "Phantom" digitally resurrects her iconic roles without her physical participation. Unlike active stars who resist AI licensing due to career and legal risks, retired celebrities like Wang, Ng Kai Wah, and You Benchang are embracing such deals. The article highlights a stark divide: established stars command premium prices for controlled, limited AI portrait rights, while unknown actors face exploitative contracts selling perpetual likeness rights for as little as $15, threatening entry-level opportunities in an industry where AI-generated content now dominates.

Revenue conversion from traffic remains the key challenge ahead.

title: 谷歌Gemini 4开跑了，一夜三连发
content: Google DeepMind launched three Gemini models and announced Gemini 4 training. Gemini 3.6 Flash reduces token usage by up to 65% while improving performance on coding and agent benchmarks, at lower prices. Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite delivers 350 tokens per second at minimal cost, outperforming larger models in some tests. Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber specializes in security vulnerability detection. Google also confirmed it began its most aggressive pretraining yet for Gemini 4, potentially ready by year-end, emphasizing reduced costs for production AI agents.

title: 重视家庭投资现金流
content: The author emphasizes building family wealth through passive cash flow rather than asset accumulation alone. Using his daughter's metaphor of a water well versus daily water fetching, he argues that sustainable income streams—such as rental properties, stocks with dividends, and new stock subscription privileges—matter more than asset size. He critiques speculative real estate investing when rental yields fail to cover loan costs, and warns against frequent stock trading as unsustainable labor. True wealth security comes from stable, growing annual cash flow, not impressive but illiquid asset values.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 大地任我行

title: Agent 赛马结束，超级工作台上位
content: Major Chinese tech firms—Tencent, Alibaba, and ByteDance—are converging their previously scattered AI agents into unified "super workbench" platforms: Tencent's WorkBuddy, Alibaba's Qwen Office, and ByteDance's TRAE Work. This signals industry maturation, moving from proliferating standalone agents toward invisible, embedded capabilities within workflow systems. Companies recognize coding tools served only millions of developers, while general office automation targets billions of workers. The shift threatens traditional SaaS interfaces; software will retreat to backend skills accessed through AI super workbenches, with vendors charging per use rather than per seat.

title: 刚刚，Gemini 3.6 Flash 正式发布，但网友笑得更大声了 | 原文
content: Google recently released three new AI models: Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber for cybersecurity. Despite marketing claims of being "more efficient" and "smarter," the launch failed to improve public perception. Users have been increasingly critical of Gemini's declining performance, with one recent comparison likening it to watching "a family member slowly develop Alzheimer's." title: OpenAI 高管炮轰 Kimi K3：中国开源是减速主义 会抑制资本投入
content: OpenAI strategy executive Dean W. Ball praised Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 model as near top-tier for agentic coding, noting its capabilities cannot be simply attributed to distillation. However, he argued that open-weight models reduce commercial returns for frontier models, representing a "decelerationist" force. He warned this trend could lead to "AI communism"—state-provided digital infrastructure—and predicted the US may raise compliance barriers against Chinese open models through security reviews. Moonshot AI released the 2.8-trillion-parameter Kimi K3 on July 16, ranking first on Frontend Code Arena, with full weights becoming available July 27.

title: How To Cut MCP Token Costs? Save Up To 92% At Scale With Code Mode 💎
content: Bifrost's Code Mode reduces LLM token costs by replacing multi-step tool chaining with single-request code generation. Instead of exposing hundreds of MCP tools directly, the LLM writes Starlark or Python code that orchestrates tools in a sandbox. Benchmarks show 58-85% token reduction and 56-83% cost savings at scale. The feature supports virtual keys with token budgets, alerts, and MCP Tool Groups that limit visible tools to improve security and efficiency.

title: How GPT-5.6 sol token is used in Codex
content: Testing of GPT-5.6 Sol in Codex CLI reveals unexpectedly high token consumption. Despite benchmarks showing GPT-5.6 Sol being more cost-effective than GPT-5.5 (e.g., DeepSWE: $3.50 vs $5.10 per task), Codex CLI 0.144.1 showed 5.6 Sol High costing 21% more than 5.5 High. The likely cause: GPT-5.5 uses multi_tool_use.parallel for multiple simultaneous tool calls, while 5.6 typically uses single exec commands, requiring 1.84x more rounds despite fewer commands per call (0.97 vs 2.5). Cache input tokens comprise 66.5% of 5.6 Sol High costs. Token-saving plugins proved ineffective; reducing LLM rounds without sacrificing results is the viable optimization.

title: “没有达到主要终点”，却可能颠覆AD领域！渤健这款tau靶向药的矛盾胜利 | 原文
content: Biogen's tau-targeting antisense drug diranersen, presented at AAIC 2026, showed cognitive decline slowing comparable to approved Alzheimer's therapies. However, the Phase II Celia trial failed its primary endpoint due to an unexpected inverse dose response—lowest dose (60mg) performed best, contrary to anticipated dose-dependent efficacy. This paradoxical result confused markets, causing Biogen's stock to drop approximately 8.4%. Despite missing the primary endpoint, the drug's overall efficacy signals potential to transform Alzheimer's treatment approaches.

title: 香港高院驳回宗馥莉上诉许可申请，判决维持 18 亿美元资产冻结令
content: On July 21, Hong Kong's High Court rejected Zong Fuli's application for leave to appeal an asset freeze order. The ruling maintains the preservation order issued on August 1, 2025, keeping approximately $1.8 billion in HSBC bank accounts frozen until the conclusion of related litigation at Hangzhou Intermediate Court. The court found none of the five grounds for appeal had reasonable prospects of success, denied an extension request, and ordered Zong Fuli's side to pay HK$250,000 in legal costs to the plaintiff.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 快科技

title: How to build interactive experiences with canvases
content: GitHub Copilot's canvases are interactive visual interfaces that extend beyond conversational AI, allowing developers to collaborate with agents through clicks and edits. Created via `/create-canvas` in the Copilot app, they support tasks like triaging issues with swipeable cards, generating codebase diagrams, managing git worktrees, coaching prompts, and finding knowledge experts across tools.
